candidate_problems.text: How can an AI system explicitly construct problems from contradictions rather than waiting for externally supplied tasks or prompts?
What system design would implement adversarial criticism, promotion, and retention of error-surviving structures as stable feedback loops rather than ad hoc evaluation stages?
Under what conditions does increasing model scale materially improve epistemic progress, rather than merely increasing conjectural variety without better error-correction?
Can the historical function of scientific institutions—making bad explanations easier to kill and good problems easier to notice—be reproduced inside a machine architecture?
If substrate matters only by supplying variety, what specific failures appear when variety is abundant but problem formation and criticism are weak?
